sentences.arabic: دَخَلْتُ مَكْتَبَ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ السِّيَاحِيَّةِ فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ušao sam u ured za turističke informacije u centru grada.
sentences.translationEn: I entered the tourist information office in the city centre.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبْتُ مِنَ الْمُوَظَّفَةِ خَرِيطَةً لِلْمَدِينَةِ وَقَائِمَةً بِأَهَمِّ الْمَعَالِمِ.
sentences.translation: Zamolio sam službenicu za kartu grada i popis najvažnijih znamenitosti.
sentences.translationEn: I asked the clerk for a city map and a list of the main sights.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَتْنِي خَرِيطَةً مَجَّانِيَّةً وَكُرَيِّسَةً صَغِيرَةً عَنِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dala mi je besplatnu kartu i malu brošuru o gradu.
sentences.translationEn: She gave me a free map and a small brochure about the city.

sentences.arabic: شَرَحَتْ لِي كَيْفَ أَصِلُ إِلَى الْحَيِّ التَّارِيخِيِّ بِالتَّرَامٍ.
sentences.translation: Objasnila mi je kako da tramvajem dođem do historijskog dijela grada.
sentences.translationEn: She explained how to reach the historic district by tram.

sentences.arabic: وَضَعْتُ الْخَرِيطَةَ فِي حَقِيبَتِي وَخَرَجْتُ لِاسْتِكْشَافِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stavio sam kartu u torbu i izašao da istražujem grad.
sentences.translationEn: I put the map in my bag and went out to explore the city.
